title: halimium halimifolium subsp. multiflorum
intro: Halimium halimifolium subsp. multiflorum, also known as Rock Rose or multiflorous Rock Rose, is a flowering plant species in the Cistus family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat wounds and skin conditions, as well as its antiseptic and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Halimium halimifolium subsp. multiflorum include its potential to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, tinctures, and creams, and can be used topically to soothe skin irritations and promote skin health.
